description: Wave 4: Sable Reach deep dive + cross-faction. 25 subjects — mixed species outlaws, salvage aesthetic, stolen gear combinations, status progression.
style_prefix: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background
negative: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero, symmetrical matching armor

subjects.prompt: thin human woman in her 30s with a shaved head and a scavenger brand on her cheek, wearing a patchwork suit assembled from three different thermal undersuits stitched together with visible mismatched thread, a headlamp rigged from a dismantled ship light, heavy gloves made from cargo container strapping, boots from a dead Compact officer with the insignia scratched off, a pry bar and a cutting torch on her belt, she strips wrecks for a living

stocky human male in his 40s with missing fingers on his left hand and a permanent grease stain around his eyes from welding goggles, wearing a Compact engineering coverall that has been cut apart and reassembled with Veshan leather patches at the elbows and knees, a homemade tool belt made from ship cable, stolen Compact boots with the soles re-glued, reactor warning patches still visible on the coverall from whatever ship it was taken from

large human male in his 30s with a broken nose reset badly and a neck tattoo of a ship registry crossed out, wearing heavy salvaged Veshan plate armor on the torso only with bare arms showing muscular scarred skin, Compact regulation trousers cut short at the knee, improvised shin guards made from hull plating strapped on with cable ties, a sawed-off shotgun-style weapon welded from pipe, this is the person who collects debts in the Reach

slight human woman in her 50s with sharp features and quick eyes that miss nothing, wearing surprisingly intact civilian clothing — a dark grey jacket over a clean-ish thermal top, practical trousers, good boots, she looks almost Compact-legal which is the point, a concealed data pad in an inner jacket pocket, a personal comm device that has been modified beyond manufacturer specs, no brands no faction marks no visible weapons, she sells information and looking unremarkable is her primary defense

teenage human male maybe fifteen or sixteen with hollow cheeks and feral alertness, wearing clothes that are clearly scavenged from larger people — a thermal shirt hanging past his hands with the sleeves crudely cut, rope-belted trousers bunched at the waist, one boot and one wrapped-foot, a small knife hidden in the rope belt, no brand no faction he belongs to no one, he lives in the spaces between the docking clamps and steals to eat

middle-aged human woman with medical knowledge and no license to practice it, wearing a mix of Compact medical whites now grey from re-use over a dark thermal undersuit, a battered medical kit held together with tape, surgical gloves that have been washed and reused too many times, no official insignia just a hand-painted red cross on her sleeve, comfortable shoes, she treats everyone who can pay and some who cannot

charming human male in his 30s with an easy smile and a hidden tension in his shoulders, wearing a decent leather jacket probably stolen from a free trader with the patches removed and his own mismatched patches sewn on, a dark thermal henley underneath, cargo trousers with secret compartments sewn into the lining, boots with hollow heels, a standard-looking data pad that actually has heavily encrypted storage, he looks almost respectable which is how smuggling works

massive scarred human male in his 50s whose silhouette is unmistakable in the Reach, wearing an assemblage of the best stolen armor from every faction — a Veshan champion chest plate with the house crest ground off and his own mark burned in, Compact officer shoulder boards bolted to pauldrons, Keth-grown shin guards that look uncomfortable on human legs, a heavy fur-lined cloak taken from someone important, multiple weapons visible, the chaos of his gear is deliberate — every piece is a trophy and everyone knows it

wiry human woman in her 40s with prematurely white hair and a twitchy trigger finger, wearing a stolen Compact flight suit with the name tag ripped off and replaced with a crude nickname patch, a modified flight harness with non-regulation additions including a concealed pistol holster at the chest, flight boots that actually fit because she stole them from a pilot her size, the flight suit has been re-dyed from Compact grey to a dark charcoal that does not quite match uniformly

compact cephalopod alien with dull grey-blue skin showing stress-pattern chromatophore discoloration from living away from their drift, two primary arms with three tapered digits, smooth bulbous head with large dark round eyes that look haunted, wearing scraps of what was once a teal circuit-woven Orryn vest now torn and patched with human fabric, data crystals that are cracked and dark instead of glowing, a human-made tool belt awkwardly strapped around the tentacle base, everything about this creature screams exile from a sophisticated culture

hard-faced human woman in her late 40s with ritual scarification on her forearms and a commanding presence, wearing an armored vest made from layered scrap metal plates riveted to a leather backing over a dark thermal suit, heavy boots with ankle knives, a belt of ammunition pouches, a modified energy pistol on one hip and a crude machete on the other, her personal color is rust-red and her crew all wear a strip of rust-red cloth somewhere on their person

teenage human of ambiguous gender maybe thirteen or fourteen with old eyes in a young face, wearing adult armor that has been crudely cut down to fit a smaller frame with gaps where the plates do not meet, oversized boots stuffed with rags to fit, a weapon that is too big for them slung across the back, no faction brand yet because even the gangs have a minimum age, someone gave this child a gun and pointed them at a problem

calm heavyset human male in his 50s with a prosthetic left arm below the elbow and a face that has heard every lie in the Reach, wearing a stained apron over mixed civilian clothes — a decent shirt from some past life, practical trousers, rubber-soled shoes for standing all day, the prosthetic arm is clearly salvaged tech not medical-grade with visible wiring and crude mounting hardware, a short club behind the bar counter within reach

dashing handsome pirate captain in a pristine white shirt with billowing sleeves and a perfectly tailored embroidered vest, polished knee-high boots, a rapier with a jeweled hilt, styled flowing hair, a clean tricorn hat with a feather, he looks like a romance novel cover not someone who lives in a lawless frontier, everything is theatrical and new and designed to look good not to survive

human gang member wearing a perfectly matching set of black tactical gear — matching plate carrier matching combat pants matching assault boots matching gloves matching helmet, all in the same matte black, all the same brand all pristine, this is a video game loadout not Sable Reach, nothing is mismatched nothing is salvaged nothing is stolen nothing tells a story

human male wearing an old west cowboy outfit in space — leather chaps over jeans, a Stetson hat, a plaid western shirt, cowboy boots with spurs, a revolver in a hip holster, a lasso on the belt, he looks like someone cosplaying a cowboy at a science fiction convention, this is not lived-in sci-fi this is a genre costume
